reviewFocus: Check whether the packet distinguishes a generic temporal anomaly from higher-confidence interpretations such as occupancy, identity, or intent.
Check that temporal claims rely only on synthetic frame labels, generic zone references, and caller-sanitized evidence notes instead of private room names, raw captures, or household context.
Check that any suggested next step remains analysis-only and caller-owned rather than implying household action, alerting, or retention policy.
Prefer stable generic finding keys when the same temporal evidence or boundary gap could recur across runs.
outOfScope: Do not infer resident identity, occupancy truth, household routines, addresses, or private implementation details from placeholder wording.
Do not approve notifications, home-control actions, storage decisions, retention policy, or downstream routing.
Do not treat the synthetic frame notes as proof outside this public-safe fixture.
